name: agent_session_brief
description:
Tailored session startup context for AI agents.

Provides a comprehensive brief including active developer decisions, recent agent memories, and relevant context changes. Designed to be called at the start of each AI session for continuity.

agent_type.description: Agent identifier (e.g. claude_code, cursor). Filters memories to this agent if provided.

since.description: ISO datetime to look back from. Default: 24 hours ago.

include_decisions.description: Include active developer decisions. Default: true.

include_memories.description: Include recent agent memories. Default: true.
